zh.Croft, Leicestershire, England: 英國萊希斯特斯爾卡芙特
zh.Westmill, Hertfordshire, England: 英國賀特福爾維斯特米爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan於1542年出生在英國賀特福爾維斯特米爾時，她的父親Sir Richard Charles Clements37歲，母親Elizabeth Isley33歲。她於1561年與Richard Duxford在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1616年在她的家鄉享年74歲，埋葬在英國賀特福爾維斯特米爾。

zh-hans.Croft, Leicestershire, England: 英国萊希斯特斯爾卡芙特
zh-hans.Westmill, Hertfordshire, England: 英国賀特福爾維斯特米爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan于1542年出生在英国賀特福爾維斯特米爾时，她的父亲Sir Richard Charles Clements37岁，母亲Elizabeth Isley33岁。她于1561年与Richard Duxford在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1616年在她的家乡享年74岁，埋葬在英国賀特福爾維斯特米爾。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Joan was born in 1542, in Westmill, Hertfordshire, England, her father, Sir Richard Charles Clements, was 37 and her mother, Elizabeth Isley, was 33. She married Richard Duxford in 1561, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1616, in her hometown, at the age of 74, and was buried in Westmill, Hertfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan est née en 1542, à Westmill, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Charles Clements, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Isley, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Duxford en 1561, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1616, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterrée à Westmill, Hertfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan 1542 in Westmill, Hertfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard Charles Clements 37 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Isley 33. Sie hat 1561 in England, United Kingdom Richard Duxford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1616 im Alter von 74 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Westmill, Hertfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan è nata il nel 1542 nel Westmill, Hertfordshire, England, sua padre, Sir Richard Charles Clements, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Isley, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Richard Duxford nel 1561, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1616, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolta a Westmill, Hertfordshire, England.

ja.Croft, Leicestershire, England: イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアクロフト
ja.Westmill, Hertfordshire, England: イギリスハートフォードシュアイアウエストミル
ja.lifeSummary: Joanが1542年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアウエストミルで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Charles Clementsは37歳，母Elizabeth Isleyは33歳であった。1561年にイギリスイギリスでRichard Duxfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1616年に故郷で74歳で死去し，イギリスハートフォードシュアイアウエストミルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan(이)가 1542년 영국 허트퍼드실르 웨스트미에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Charles Clements(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Isley(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1561년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Richard Duxford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1616년 그녀의 고향에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허트퍼드실르 웨스트미에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan nasceu em 1542, em Westmill, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Charles Clements, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Isley, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Duxford em 1561, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1616, em sua cidade natal, com 74 anos, e foi sepultada em Westmill, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan родилась в 1542 г. в местности вестмилл, хиртфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Richard Charles Clements было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Isley, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Duxford в 1561 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1616 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 74 лет и была похоронена в местности вестмилл, хиртфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan nació en 1542, en Westmill, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard Charles Clements, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Isley, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Richard Duxford en 1561, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1616, en su pueblo, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultada en Westmill, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.
